emails.subject: Re: Southern California Edison Company
emails.body: Thanks Jeff. Yesterday we sold 50 MW for 5 years out of January '01 for $60.00 in the unconstrained zone (i.e SCE1) Chris From: Jeff Dasovich@ENRON on 11/17/2000 02:08 PM CST Sent by: Jeff Dasovich@ENRON

emails.subject: Re: Southern California Edison Company
emails.body: Re: Southern California Edison Company Congratulations. Even though it's the EEI agreement, getting Edison to agree to sign something is an achievement. Good luck landing deals. Jeff Mary Hain@ECT 11/17/2000 01:51 PM
